query: SELECT id, title, liverName, startTime, endTime FROM schedules WHERE liverName IN ('Ryu', 'NANA配信') ORDER BY startTime LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, title, liverName, startTime, endTime FROM schedules WHERE liverName IN ('Ryu', 'NANA配信') ORDER BY startTime LIMIT 20;
